rationale.R1.4: Fails to adequately compare against existing work on step-by-step prompting. Only mentions prior work by the same authors.
rationale.RX.1: Does not identify uncertainty in claims made about the performance of StepWise-CoT.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within the requested scope, but focuses heavily on comparing against the authors' own prior work and does not engage with broader CoT literature.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content identified.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide provenance or traceability for claims made about the performance of StepWise-CoT.
